summary: First testing run for Field Intelligence Platform MVP. 21/21 backend pytest cases PASSED (100%). Frontend critical flows validated end-to-end (TM/Manager/Admin login, dashboards, doctors, doctor profile tabs, tasks, search, full 3-step log-visit including live Claude Sonnet 4.5 AI analyze, save → redirect to doctor profile, logout). RBAC, idempotent seed, AI extraction, task auto-creation from promises, audit access control, admin user creation all verified.

issues: Admin landing dashboard shows 'Loading...' for several seconds; admin uses manager dashboard endpoint which enriches all doctors — consider showing skeletons or paginating doctor enrichment

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 950+ lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, doctors, visits, tasks, dashboards, admin) for maintainability.

_enrich_doctor performs 4-5 separate DB queries per doctor; called in a loop on /api/doctors and /api/dashboard/* — for 10 doctors this is fine but will not scale beyond a few hundred. Consider aggregation pipeline or precomputed enrichment cache.
Audit logs for read operations are missing (e.g., view_sensitive). Only login/logout/create/update are recorded; problem statement mentions view_sensitive/export action types.
/api/dashboard/manager allows Admin to see global numbers but the response key naming hides team_id scoping — fine but document explicitly.
TM PUT /api/doctors silently drops disallowed fields (doctor_name etc) and returns 200 — consider 403 instead so client knows the update was partial.
_strip_user mutates the user dict returned from get_current_user (which already excludes password_hash) — minor inconsistency, harmless.
seed_data_creation: Seed already executed previously; POST /api/seed/init now correctly returns {skipped: true}. Tests created TEST_-prefixed visits/tasks/users which remain in DB (cleanup not implemented but data is namespaced).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_field_intelligence.py covers seed, auth, doctors RBAC (admin=10, manager=10 team, tm1=5, tm2=5, cross-TM 404 read+update), filters, AI analyze (live Claude), visit creation w/ task auto-creation and free_text_note preservation, task buckets + completion, TM/Manager dashboards, search, audit RBAC, admin user creation. Run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_field_intelligence.py -v. AI call takes ~3-15s; tests timeout=60s. Frontend log-visit is a 3-step wizard (step1: pick doctor + visit type → click Next → step2: visit-note-textarea + analyze-btn → step3 review/save) — visit-note-textarea only appears in step 2.
